fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) WgpuOverlay/ directory (WgpuOverlay.tsx, gpu-init.ts, gpu-buffers.ts, gpu-render-loop.ts, element-scanner.ts, element-types.ts, overlay-api.ts, thumbnail-capture.ts) moved to viewer-api/frontend/src/components/WgpuOverlay/. 2) effects/ directory (palette.ts, palette.wgsl, particle-shading.wgsl, background.wgsl, particles.wgsl, compute.wgsl, types.wgsl, noise.wgsl) moved to viewer-api/frontend/src/effects/. 3) Scene3D/math3d.ts moved to viewer-api/frontend/src/utils/math3d.ts. 4) Scene3D/ component moved to viewer-api/frontend/src/components/Scene3D/. 5) ELEMENT_SELECTORS made configurable via WgpuOverlay props. 6) log-viewer imports all moved GPU code from @context-engine/viewer-api-frontend. 7) @webgpu/types added to viewer-api devDependencies. 8) Both log-viewer and viewer-api typecheck cleanly.
fields.title: Impl: Move WgpuOverlay + shaders + effects to viewer-api
